segments.text: Blessed are those who have regard for the weak;
the Lord delivers them in times of trouble.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The Lord protects and preserves them— they are counted among the blessed in the land— he does not give them over to the desire of their foes.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The Lord sustains them on their sickbed and restores them from their bed of illness.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I said,
Have mercy on me, Lord; heal me, for I have sinned against you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My enemies say of me in malice, 'When will he die and his name perish?'
segments.speaker: David's Enemies

segments.text: When one of them comes to see me,
he speaks falsely, while his heart gathers slander;
segments.speaker: David's Enemy

segments.text: then he goes out and spreads it around.
All my enemies whisper together against me;
they imagine the worst for me, saying,
segments.speaker: David's Enemies

segments.text: A vile disease has afflicted him; he will never get up from the place where he lies.
segments.speaker: David's Enemies

segments.text: Even my close friend, someone I trusted, one who shared my bread,
has turned against me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But may you have mercy on me, Lord; raise me up, that I may repay them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I know that you are pleased with me,
for my enemy does not triumph over me.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Because of my integrity you uphold me and set me in your presence forever.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Praise be to the Lord, the God of Israel, from everlasting to everlasting. Amen and Amen.
segments.speaker: The LORD
